name: s4l-plugin
description: Discover Twitter threads worth replying to, draft grounded replies in your voice, and post them through your own logged-in browser. Human-in-the-loop, approval-gated.

tools.name: setup_login
tools.description: Getting-started / login check. Opens the headed browser at X and reports whether the user's session is logged in. Call FIRST before any other tool, and any time a tool reports a login wall.

tools.name: discover_threads
tools.description: Search X/Twitter's Live tab for recent threads matching a query and return structured candidates (url, author, text, posted_at).

tools.name: read_thread
tools.description: Open a specific tweet URL and return the original post plus top replies so a reply can be grounded in the actual conversation.

tools.name: post_comment
tools.description: Post a reply to a tweet through the user's own logged-in browser. Only after the user has explicitly approved the exact text.
